title: LoloCraft
body:
LoloCraftV for Minecraft 1.16.5

With the LoloCraft Mod, you can enhance your Minecraft experience even further. With new biomes, new weapons, new ores, and much more, you can improve your Minecraft life. There are also several new mobs and a new boss. Experience the features of the LoloCraft Mod and download it for Minecraft 1.16.5!

 

New Tools:

The tools of the LoloCraft Mod have various functions. Among them, for example, is a new multi-tool that can be used for digging earth, mining stone, and farming.

New Mobs:

The mobs in the LoloCraftV Mod are Vanilla mobs with new textures to provide variety.

The Boss:

The boss of the LoloCraft Mod is Willi! He resides in his randomly generated house in the Galaxy biome. Equip yourself well before taking him on.

 

Links: 

Website: https://lolocraft.net

## DO NOT USE THE .de DOMAIN FROM LOLOCRAFT!
